name: SET:IQ + REQ:IQ
author: Lights of Elm Ridge
description: Lights of Elm Ridge IQ tools for FPP. SET:IQ: pull cloud-generated playlists straight onto the box (or import uploaded JSON) with one click. REQ:IQ: background listener that lets viewers see what's playing and request songs from their phones — requests are inserted into playback automatically. Runs entirely on the FPP host, so no CORS / mixed-content / Private-Network-Access issues apply.
